titleStmt.title: SII 23.19: original edition by G.V. Srinivasa Rao
No. 19. (A.R. No. 19 of 1907.) Tiruviśalūr, Kumbhakonam Taluk, Tanjavur District Śivayōganātha temple—on the west wall of the central shrine Rājarāja I: year 5: 989-90 A.D.

summary.p: This is an inscription of Rājarājakēsarivarman (Rājarāja I) dated in his 5th year of reign. The details of date Dhanus, Sunday Mūla, Pratipad, would give the English equivalent as A.D. 989, December 1; f.d.t. 27. The tithi was śu. 1. This registers an endowment of 100 Īḻakkāśu made by his queen Baṭṭan Dānatoṅgiyār to the temple of Paramasvāmi at Tiruviśalūr in Amaninārāyaṇa-chaturvēdimaṅgalam to provide (with the interest on the amount) for the principal daily offerings to God and to feed therewith five Brāhmaṇas in the temple, and for the supply of paddy for the maintenance of some others (number not clear) well versed in the Vēdas, Vēdārtha and Mantra. The details of the gift are lost in the damaged portions of the record.

revisionDesc.change: Conversion of digital encoding to DHARMA encoding scheme according to EGD (Encoding Guide for Diplomatic Editions)

div.p:
svasti śrī . korājarājakecarivarmmaṟkku yāṇṭu 5Āvatu Iv vāṭṭai dhanunāyaṟṟu nāyaṟṟukkiḻamaiyum mūlamum pakka
prathipatamum kūṭiṉa varayogattiṉpotu vaṭakarait tevatāṉabrahma deyam Amaṉinārāyaṇacatu
rvetimaṅkalattut tiruvicalūr paramasvāmi koyilil śrīrājarājadevar devi yār paṭṭaṉ tāṉatoṅkiyār Aiyvar
[brāhmaṇa]r Uṇpatukku vāci paṭātiṉa nellukkum poṉṉukkuñ celli nūṟu Īḻakkācu palicaikkuk kāciṉ
ṅkaḷ dharmmappalicai kāṇikkācu palicaiyāy Ikkācu nūṟukkum tiṅkaḷ Oṉṟeykāṟ kācum palicaiyāl
Orāṇṭaikku van=ta palicaikkācu patiṉaintu Ikkācu patiṉaintiluṅ kācoṉṟinukku nelleṟiluñ curuṅkilum patiṉ
kalavaṇṇamāka Ivvūr poṟkālā lāṭṭaivaṭṭam van=ta Innel nūṟṟaimpatiṉ kalattilum nicati
nāṉṟu Irutūṇippatakkāka kaḷil m perunti
Orāṭṭaikku vanta ḷa 1000 Innel patiṉkalamuṅ koṇṭu perun=tiruvamirtu ceyvippatāvatu ceyyumpaṭiyāvatu
nellāl tūṇippatakkarici mukkuṟuṇiyāṟ ṟiruvamirtu Oṉṟu patakku nāṉāḻi nellālu neyyamirtu n=tayiramituṅ kaṟiyamirtum
mirutum kkumaṟa tu tiruvamutukku veṇṭuvatu koṇṭu Aṟṟai nāḷkaḷāl vaitikapeṟum Uccampoḻtu tiruvamirtu ceyvatāka
nūṟṟunāṟpatiṉ kalamum Ivvūr brāhmaṇar vedamum vedārthamum Aṟivarāy teyvattoṭu mandrārttha maṟivārā yip brāhmaṇarku A
rak kāṭṭiṉārkku nicatam perā leḻu nāḻiyuriye yiruceviṭaraiyākap perā lāṭṭaivaṭṭam van=ta I Irupatteṇkalamuṅ kuṭuppatākavum Ivaru Idevar
palicai taṇṭavum Iddharmmam Ivarkaḷe rakṣikkakkaṭavārākavum Ikkācu nūṟum candādittavaṟ Aḻikkap peṟātāṟākavu mivarpakkal c ceyyil vāttu
Ivarkaḷ ḷvatākavum IpparicuThe rest of the line and the last two lines are seriously damaged.
Digital edition of SII 23.19 by automatically converted to DHARMA conventions.
